nasb.text: But the governor said to them, “Which of the two do you want me to release for you?” And they said, “Barabbas.”

esv.text: The governor again said to them, “Which of the two do you want me to release for you?” And they said, “Barabbas.”

cnv.text: 總督問他們：“這兩個人，你們要我給你們釋放哪一個？”他們說：“巴拉巴！”

ccb.text: 总督再次问百姓：“这两个人，你们要我释放哪一个？”他们说：“巴拉巴！”

csbs.text: 总督问他们，说：“这两个人中，你们要我给你们释放哪一个呢？” 他们回答说：“巴拉巴！”
